metadata.description: Agent Workspace Marketplace - Curated high-performance agents, tools, and plugins for GitHub Copilot CLI and VS Code

plugins.name: workspace-optimizer
plugins.description: Intelligent developer environment and terminal workspace configurator. Automatically detects your stack, installs required linters, formatters, and sets up project-specific shell shortcuts.

plugins.name: pr-assistant
plugins.description: Your virtual partner for pull requests. Analyzes repository branch differences, builds interactive and descriptive PR draft bodies, links relevant issues, and suggests reviewer assignments based on git blame history.
